## Summary

What does this PR change and why (physics/numerics rationale, not just code)?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New metric / solver / diagnostic / visualization
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / tooling

## Validation
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated a test asserting a conserved or known quantity
- [ ] `ruff check .` clean
- [ ] For visualization/solver changes: attached before/after figure or numbers

## Related issues

Closes #
